text.message: bro this has got to be red no?
yeah but we gnna extort instead lol
I have to hustle to get brick this game.  Can't throw away my game because we gotta hit the guy on 3 points
red would trade u brick for wood without the xtort
he just has a monster setup
plenty of brick on the board
There was 0 except for on reds hand
but you block our brick and then trade with red lol
Im not sure what you want to hear.  I'm gonna just stop talking
an apology would be nice lol
nah its all good im just saying
kinda need to be road guy at this point
Black any deal we can make to leave the spot for me?
At least maybe I'll stop getting gang robbed
"this elo" was the phrase that was thrown out?
ive hit red every time idk what ur saying
Blue robbed me right after the plow, so I'm using his phrase
bro were not trading you the win lol
